mapper.insert: insert into pf_checkin_log(member_id, member_name, card_id, checkin_time, course_id, course_name, times_consumed, remaining_after, create_time) values(#{memberId}, #{memberName}, #{cardId}, now(), #{courseId}, #{courseName}, #{timesConsumed}, #{remainingAfter}, now())
mapper.select: select * from pf_checkin_log where member_id = #{memberId} order by checkin_time desc
